'''wangoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadmap|roadmap]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ng-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadmap|roadmap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wangoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wængeheth|wængeheth]] || [[word:wængehej|wængehej]] || [[word:wængehesh|wængehesh]] || [[word:wængehe|wængehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangongohoth|wangongohoth]] || [[word:wangongohoj|wangongohoj]] || [[word:wangongohosh|wangongohosh]] || [[word:wangongoho|wangongoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangohoth|wangohoth]] || [[word:wangohoj|wangohoj]] || [[word:wangohosh|wangohosh]] || [[word:wangoho|wangoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wangofhoth|wangofhoth]] || [[word:wangofhoj|wangofhoj]] || [[word:wangofhosh|wangofhosh]] || [[word:wangofhof|wangofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wangohotho|wangohotho]] || [[word:wangohojo|wangohojo]] || [[word:wangohosho|wangohosho]] || [[word:wangohoko|wangohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wangohoth|wangohoth]] || [[word:wangohoj|wangohoj]] || [[word:wangohosh|wangohosh]] || [[word:wangoho|wangoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wangohothol|wangohothol]] || [[word:wangohojol|wangohojol]] || [[word:wangohoshol|wangohoshol]] || [[word:wangohokol|wangohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wangohothotho|wangohothotho]] || [[word:wangohojojo|wangohojojo]] || [[word:wangohoshosho|wangohoshosho]] || [[word:wangohoko|wangohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wangohothon|wangohothon]] || [[word:wangohojon|wangohojon]] || [[word:wangohoshon|wangohoshon]] || [[word:wangohokon|wangohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wangohothoro|wangohothoro]] || [[word:wangohojoro|wangohojoro]] || [[word:wangohoshoro|wangohoshoro]] || [[word:wangohokoro|wangohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
